title: Helm version-check notice (HELM-H8, D10/D12)
description: Static JSON, no backend, published at HELM_VERSION_CHECK_URL (default https://ainumbers.co/helm/version.json — site repo publishes it, coordinated separately from this repo). The hub polls this on an interval and surfaces a passive notice; it NEVER downloads or applies an update itself (D10 explicitly rules out an in-process auto-updater in Phase 1).
